scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/tauri-release build && bun run --cwd packages/auth build && bun run --cwd packages/brand build && bun run --cwd packages/flags build && bun run --cwd packages/billing build && bun run --cwd packages/edge-shared build && bun run --cwd packages/sync build
scripts.test:supabase: supabase test db supabase/tests/database --local && bun run supabase/tests/welcome-credits-concurrency.ts && bun test packages/billing/test/checkout-lifecycle.contract.test.ts && bun test packages/sync/test/lww.contract.test.ts && bun test packages/edge-shared/test/router-attempt.contract.test.ts
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run test:coverage && bun run build
